commit_scope: Land the fkwu-native host resources spec (no Go emission bar, BML platform interfaces, local sovereignty RAG). Unblock T_flat self-host: split fkc-table-serialize.fk from hati-os-kernel-emit.fk, add FOURTH_FLATTEN_CHAIN without C-emission literals, regenerate T_flat, prove fkwu self-host flatten (fs-list verdict 3). Add rh-heal-sovereignty for architecture doc indexing.

standard_receipt.claim: Per-band flatten runs on fkwu via T_flat without bin-go in the runtime loop; sovereignty architecture is spec'd and indexable locally.
standard_receipt.body: yes — flattener + fkc-table-serialize are Form; fkwu walks T_flat to flatten bands
standard_receipt.c_bootstrap: pending — fkwu still built from Go-emitted C + clang
standard_receipt.toolchain_free: pending — one-time T_flat bootstrap still uses bin-go; runtime self-host flatten is toolchain-free

platforms.mac: observed — four-way fs-list + fkwu self-host flatten verdict 3 this session

standard_receipt.honest_floor: T_flat bootstrap still uses bin-go over FOURTH_FLATTEN_CHAIN (~1.4GB peak). Runtime band flatten on fkwu does not. Full spec bar (c-bootstrap, BML Host* per platform) not yet met.

evidence_refs: T_FLAT SELF-HOST: fkwu + fourth-flatten-table.txt flattens fs-list-band -> verdict 3 without bin-go in runtime (mac). Split fkc-table-serialize.fk (118KB) from emit (42KB); FOURTH_FLATTEN_CHAIN omits hati-os-kernel-emit.fk.
T_FLAT BOOTSTRAP: bin-go over FOURTH_FLATTEN_CHAIN -> 581150 bytes, peak RSS 1.4GB (one-time; not runtime).
FOUR-WAY: validate.sh fs-list-band -> 3, fourth arm four-way.
SPEC: specs/fkwu-native-host-resources.md — BML Host* interfaces mac/windows/android, c-bootstrap receipt, local RAG.

fourth_arm_outputs: fs-list four-way incl fkwu; self-host flatten verdict 3

phase_gate.reason: Self-host flatten observed; c-bootstrap + platform BML impls pending per spec.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Runtime band flatten on fkwu without bin-go; spec + RAG sovereignty corpus path.
